title: hemionitis micropteris
intro: Hemionitis micropteris, also known as the Micropteris fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Hemionitis micropteris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
intro_study: According to "Evidence-based complementary and alternative medicine : eCAM", hemionitis micropteris (SHE) benefits include accelerating the healing of first- and second-degree pressure wounds in patients with brain-spinal cord injuries.
